audit_items.proof_trace: ldap_pvt_thread_rdwr_writers returns int (an integer count of active writers), not a pointer, so the property's assertion that callers must NULL-check the return value before dereferencing it is a category error — integers are never dereferenced. Both callers (ldap_pvt_thread_rdwr_active at rdwr.c:455-456 and the debug wrapper in thr_debug.c:1154-1158) use the return value arithmetically, never as a pointer. The function itself is debug-only, compiled only under #ifdef LDAP_RDWR_DEBUG.
